name: Barbecue Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap the ribs in a double thickness of foil and bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Unwrap the ribs and drain any drippings.
3. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and pour over the ribs.
4. Marinate the ribs at room temperature for 1 hour.
5. Bake the marinated ribs at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for another 30 minutes, basting with sauce. Alternatively, grill the ribs for 30 minutes, turning them occasionally and basting with sauce.
